spec.name: A Looted Tomb
spec.description: The floor of this small tomb is littered with the lids of smashed sarcophagi, bits of treasure dropped by thieves and looters, and corpses pulled from their resting places.

north.description: You see a small crack in the wall through which you might be able to slide.

east.description: To the east is another tomb.

west.description: To the west is another tomb.
